opportunities.title: Virtual Assistant Panelist
opportunities.description:
Looking for motivated individuals to join national focus groups and market research studies.

  • Participate in various research activities to provide valuable insights.
  • Earn up to $750 per week in your spare time.

Applicants must register and apply to determine qualification for each study.

This opportunity offers flexible scheduling and a chance to earn extra income while sharing your opinions.

Please mention the word **REMISSION** and tag ROjox when applying to show you read the job post completely (#ROjox). This is a beta feature to avoid
